---
title: "R2E, LLC. Tenant Management Database"
---

Developed as part of a graduate-level Systems Analysis & Design course, this project involved designing and implementing a relational tenant management database for a simulated property management company. The system replaces spreadsheet-based tracking with a structured Microsoft Access database that manages properties, tenants, service requests, and employees through centralized data entry, reporting, and query-based monitoring. The objective was to improve operational organization, strengthen data integrity, and provide clearer visibility into maintenance workflows and tenant management activities.

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Executive Overview

~~~{=html}
<iframe
  src="r2e_tenant_management_database/Executive_Overview.pdf"
  style="width:100%; height:1100px; border:0;">
</iframe>
~~~

## Entity Relationship Diagram

~~~{=html}
<iframe
  src="r2e_tenant_management_database/Entity_Relationship_Diagram.pdf"
  style="width:100%; height:1000px; border:0;">
</iframe>
~~~

## System Features & Workflows

~~~{=html}
<iframe
  src="r2e_tenant_management_database/System_Features_&_Workflows.pdf"
  style="width:100%; height:1100px; border:0;">
</iframe>
~~~

:::
